user.title: Set up FLODE
user.description:
FLODE is a visual automation editor for Home Assistant. It allows you to create and manage your automations using a visual flow editor.

Click Submit to add FLODE to your Home Assistant.

init.title: FLODE Options
init.description: Override the language FLODE's own UI uses, independent of Home Assistant's active language.

lossy_import.title: FLODE couldn't fully understand an imported automation

report_import_issue.name: Report lossy import
report_import_issue.description: Creates a Repair issue for an automation FLODE couldn't round-trip losslessly during import. Called by FLODE's own frontend — not meant to be used directly.

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The automation entity that was imported.

warnings.name: Warnings
warnings.description: The parser warnings explaining what wasn't understood.
